operator_setup_notes: This data source has typed-column data that doesn't look like CEF (columns are camelCase API fields, JSON sub-objects, etc.). Most likely arrives via the XSIAM HTTP Collector with a source tag mapped to vendor=`CybelAngel`, product=`CybelAngel`, or via a vendor-specific XDR connector pull. Phantom can POST JSON to the HTTP collector; the operator must configure the collector's source tag to land events in this dataset.
